description_long: This object is a firearm with a classic design, featuring a long, cylindrical barrel and a prominent drum magazine beneath the receiver. The stock and foregrip are made of dark wood, providing a traditional appearance and ergonomic handling. The receiver and barrel are constructed from dark metal, with visible ribbing along the top of the barrel for added grip and heat dissipation. The trigger guard is rounded and encloses a standard trigger, while the drum magazine is large and circular, suggesting a high ammunition capacity. The overall build is robust, with a full wooden stock and a forward grip for stability during use. The finish is a combination of matte metal and polished wood, giving it a utilitarian yet classic look.
description: A robust firearm with a long metal barrel, wooden stock and foregrip, and a large drum magazine beneath the receiver. The design combines matte metal and polished wood for a classic, utilitarian appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the firearm, including the wooden stock, foregrip, and large drum magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular drum magazine and the cylindrical barrel extending outward.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the first, with clear visibility of the wooden components and drum magazine.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the wooden stock and the back of the receiver, with the drum magazine visible below.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with ribbing along the top
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
